channel.title: Gallery on Design Moodboard Archive
channel.description: Recent content in Gallery on Design Moodboard Archive

item.title: 440 Gallery
item.description: Saved under People / Artist / International from the artist reference list. Use this entry for fine art, illustration, gallery, painting, craft, textile, sculpture, photography, and visual moodboard references. Primary location/focus: Brooklyn, New York, USA.

item.description: Saved under People / Artist / International from the artist reference list. Use this entry for fine art, illustration, gallery, painting, craft, textile, sculpture, photography, and visual moodboard references. Primary location/focus: New Jersey / Seoul / New York.

item.title: Mukesh Art Gallery
item.description: Saved under Stores / Objects / Art / Indian from the art-store list. Use this entry for Indian art, wall decor, craft, gallery, and object-sourcing references. Primary location/base: Jaipur, Rajasthan.
